creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
This needs to be approved by the maintainer of mail/dovecot-antispam
(CCd) rather than me as maintainer of mail/dovecot.

Regards,
Robin

On Thu, Jul 3, 2008 at 5:40 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/dovecot,
>
> Please note that PR ports/125198 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125198
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
